style: neon sci-fi noir pixel art — boss-style mechanical warship aesthetic
palette_notes: Solid pure black background. Mechanical panel detail with thick neon rim lights along edges. Glowing plasma core at center with white hot-spot. Symmetric cannon pods / wing flanges. Limited palette, crisp pixel edges, NO anti-aliasing. Player = cyan/magenta rim on gunmetal titanium. Scout = lime/emerald rim on charcoal. Bomber = magenta/yellow rim on charcoal. Drone = crimson rim on gunmetal orb. Pickup = cyan/magenta faceted crystal with white hot-spot.

sprites.name: ship
sprites.label: Player Ship
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down futuristic player starfighter sprite, solid black background, sleek arrowhead fuselage with mechanical panel detail, gunmetal titanium hull with thick bright cyan and magenta neon rim lights along panel edges, glowing cyan plasma cockpit canopy at the center with a white hot-spot, symmetric wing flanges with pointed tips, dual magenta plasma thruster glow at the rear base, menacing sleek arrowhead silhouette pointing upward, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: scout
sprites.label: Scout Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down alien scout attack-drone sprite, solid black background, aggressive delta-wing silhouette pointing downward, gunmetal charcoal hull with thick acid lime green and emerald neon rim lights along panel edges, glowing lime plasma core orb at the center with a white hot-spot, symmetric swept wing tips, sharp pointed nose pointing down, menacing angular silhouette, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter enemy, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: bomber
sprites.label: Bomber Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down alien heavy bomber saucer sprite, solid black background, wide round flying-saucer silhouette pointing downward, gunmetal charcoal hull with thick deep magenta and amber yellow neon rim lights along panel edges, glowing yellow plasma core orb at the center with a white hot-spot, symmetric cannon pods flanking the sides, heavy mechanical panel detail, chunky menacing silhouette, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter enemy, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: drone
sprites.label: Drone Enemy
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down spherical hunter-killer drone sprite, solid black background, menacing round orb silhouette, gunmetal charcoal hull with thick crimson red neon rim lights along panel seams, glowing bright red plasma cyclops eye at the center with a white hot-spot, symmetric orbital spike rings, aggressive mechanical shell plating, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter enemy, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: boss
sprites.label: Boss Sentinel
sprites.prompt: pixel art top-down massive alien boss warship sprite, solid black background, wide ominous mechanical fortress silhouette pointing downward, gunmetal charcoal hull with thick violet and magenta neon rim lights along panel edges, glowing violet plasma core orb at the center with a white hot-spot, symmetric cannon pods flanking the sides, menacing wing flanges, heavy mechanical detail, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter boss, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: pickup
sprites.label: Weapon Pickup
sprites.prompt: pixel art weapon power-up crystal collectible sprite, solid black background, small faceted diamond silhouette, gunmetal charcoal rim with thick cyan and magenta neon rim lights along crystal edges, glowing cyan plasma core at the center with a bright white hot-spot, symmetric angular facets, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter pickup, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing

sprites.name: boss2
sprites.label: Boss Interceptor (Cycle 2)
sprites.prompt: pixel art strict top-down overhead view alien interceptor boss warship, camera looking straight down from above, NO perspective or isometric angle, massive boomerang crescent silhouette with giant swept scythe wings dominating the full width, nose pointing straight downward toward bottom of frame, twin enormous protruding railgun barrels at the front center, gunmetal charcoal armor hull panels with thick blazing electric orange and amber neon rim lights tracing every panel seam, glowing amber plasma reactor core dead center with brilliant white hot-spot, serrated trailing wing edges, four thruster vents at the rear, menacing predator warship seen from directly above, solid pure black background, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter boss, crisp pixel palette, no anti-aliasing, no 3D perspective distortion

sprites.name: boss3
sprites.label: Boss Colossus (Cycle 3)
sprites.prompt: pixel art strict top-down overhead view alien colossus dreadnought boss, camera looking straight down from above, NO perspective or isometric angle, massive symmetric cross-shaped armored fortress silhouette with four enormous heavy cannon turret pods extending outward from each arm, tip of lower arm pointing straight down toward bottom of frame, overlapping thick armor plate segments with rivets and ventilation slits, central blood-red plasma reactor at the dead center with brilliant white hot-spot radiating energy vein lines outward to each cannon, gunmetal charcoal hull with blood-red and deep crimson neon rim lights blazing along every armor edge, vast imposing dreadnought of annihilation seen from directly above, solid pure black background, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter final boss, crisp pixel palette, no anti-aliasing, no 3D perspective distortion

sprites.name: bomb
sprites.label: Bomb Pickup
sprites.prompt: pixel art screen-clear bomb power-up collectible sprite, solid black background, small hexagonal grenade silhouette, gunmetal charcoal rim with thick orange and red neon rim lights along hex edges, glowing orange plasma core at the center with a bright white hot-spot, symmetric angular hex facets with a warning symbol, sci-fi noir bullet-hell shooter pickup, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing
